title: taraxacum platyphyllinum
intro: Taraxacum platyphyllinum, also known as broad-leaved dandelion or false dandelion, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is characterized by its broad, toothed leaves and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum platyphyllinum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or inflorescence, and is also used in herbal preparations such as capsules and tablets to harness its medicinal properties.
